reviews.comment:
Imposible pasar por Ojo de Agua sin comprar los increíbles sanguchasos de jamón crudo de aquí! Recomendadísimo.

(Translated by Google)
It's impossible to pass through Ojo de Agua without buying the incredible raw ham sandwiches here! Highly recommended.

reviews.comment:
Instalaciones sucias. El bar con todas las mesas sucias y precios caros. No llevaron el pedido a la mesa. La estación de servicio sin nafta un domingo. Baños impresentables.  No lo recomiendo

(Translated by Google)
Dirty facilities. The bar had filthy tables and expensive prices. They didn't bring our order to the table. The gas station was out of fuel on a Sunday. The bathrooms were appalling. I don't recommend it.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURJMGJEWFBBEAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente comida por kilo, variedad y buena calidad, suelen tener hasta tarde dependiendo la temporada, baños limpios y variedad en el shop, también cuenta con habitaciones si se quiere pasar la noche ahí.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent food sold by weight, variety and good quality, they usually stay open late depending on the season, clean bathrooms and a variety of items in the shop, they also have rooms if you want to spend the night there.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURJcXZTRFhREAE
